description: A springy toggle with clear active, inactive, and disabled states.
docs:
# Switch
A springy toggle with clear active, inactive, and disabled states.
## Import
```tsx
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Switch checked disabled={false} type={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **checked** (boolean) — default: `true`: Checked
- **disabled** (boolean) — default: `false`: Disabled
- **label** (string): Label
- **type** (string): Type
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add switch
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/switch
```
